# Image to Video

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/imageToVideo`
- Source API mapping path: `/src/docs/apiReference/model/imageToVideo/api.ts`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/api-sT7B2GvD.js`

## Endpoint IDs

- `create-image-to-video`
- `query-image-to-video-single`
- `query-image-to-video-list`

## Endpoint Paths

- `/v1/videos/image2video`
- `/v1/videos/image2video/{id}`

## Raw API Chunk Source

```javascript
const e={title:{en:"Image to Video",zh:"图生视频"},endpoints:[{id:"create-image-to-video",method:"POST",path:"/v1/videos/image2video",title:{en:"Create Task",zh:"创建任务"},notices:[{en:"Please note that in order to maintain naming consistency, the original model field has been changed to model_name. Please use this field to specify the model version in the future.",zh:"请您注意，为了保持命名统一，原 model 字段变更为 model_name 字段，未来请您使用该字段来指定需要调用的模型版本。"},{en:"We maintain backward compatibility. If you continue using the original model field, it will not affect API calls and will be equivalent to the default behavior when model_name is empty (i.e., calling the V1 model).",zh:"同时，我们保持了行为上的向前兼容，如您继续使用原 model 字段，不会对接口调用有任何影响、不会有任何异常，等价于 model_name 为空时的默认行为（即调用V1模型）"}],headers:[{name:"Content-Type",type:"string",required:!0,default:"application/json",description:{en:"Data Exchange Format",zh:"数据交换格式"}},{name:"Authorization",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Authentication information, refer to API authentication",zh:"鉴权信息，参考接口鉴权"}}],requestBody:[{name:"model_name",type:"string",required:!1,default:"kling-v1",description:{en:"Model Name",zh:"模型名称"},enum:["kling-v1","kling-v1-5","kling-v1-6","kling-v2-master","kling-v2-1","kling-v2-1-master","kling-v2-5-turbo","kling-v2-6"]},{name:"image",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Reference Image",zh:"参考图像"},notes:[{en:"- Supports image Base64 encoding or image URL (ensure accessibility)",zh:"- 支持传入图片 Base64 编码或图片 URL（确保可访问）"},{en:"- Important: When using Base64, do NOT add any prefix like `data:image/png;base64,`. Submit only the raw Base64 string.",zh:"- 注意：请确保您传递的所有图像数据参数均采用Base64编码格式。若您使用 Base64 方式，请不要在 Base64 编码字符串前添加任何前缀（如 `data:image/png;base64,`），直接传递 Base64 编码后的字符串即可。"},{en:"- Correct Base64 format:\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```",zh:"- 正确的 Base64 编码参数：\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```"},{en:"- Incorrect Base64 format (with data: prefix):\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```",zh:"- 错误的 Base64 编码参数（包含 data: 前缀）：\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```"},{en:"- Supported image formats: `.jpg / .jpeg / .png`",zh:"- 图片格式支持 `.jpg / .jpeg / .png`"},{en:"- File size: ≤10MB, dimensions: min 300px, aspect ratio: 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1",zh:"- 图片文件大小不能超过 10MB，图片宽高尺寸不小于 300px，图片宽高比介于 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1 之间"},{en:"- At least one of `image` or `image_tail` must be provided; both cannot be empty",zh:"- image 参数与 image_tail 参数至少二选一，二者不能同时为空"},{en:"- `image + image_tail`, `dynamic_masks/static_mask`, and `camera_control` are mutually exclusive - only one can be used at a time",zh:"- image + image_tail 参数、dynamic_masks/static_mask 参数、camera_control 参数三选一，不能同时使用"},{en:"- Support varies by model version and video mode. See [Capability Map](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap) for details.",zh:"- 不同模型版本、视频模式支持范围不同，详见[能力地图](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap)"}]},{name:"image_tail",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Reference Image - End frame control",zh:"参考图像 - 尾帧控制"},notes:[{en:"- Supports image Base64 encoding or image URL (ensure accessibility)",zh:"- 支持传入图片 Base64 编码或图片 URL（确保可访问）"},{en:"- Important: When using Base64, do NOT add any prefix like `data:image/png;base64,`. Submit only the raw Base64 string.",zh:"- 注意：若您使用 Base64 方式，请不要在 Base64 编码字符串前添加任何前缀（如 `data:image/png;base64,`），直接传递 Base64 编码后的字符串即可。"},{en:"- Supported image formats: `.jpg / .jpeg / .png`",zh:"- 图片格式支持 `.jpg / .jpeg / .png`"},{en:"- File size: ≤10MB, dimensions: min 300px",zh:"- 图片文件大小不能超过 10MB，图片宽高尺寸不小于 300px"},{en:"- At least one of `image` or `image_tail` must be provided; both cannot be empty",zh:"- image 参数与 image_tail 参数至少二选一，二者不能同时为空"},{en:"- `image + image_tail`, `dynamic_masks/static_mask`, and `camera_control` are mutually exclusive - only one can be used at a time",zh:"- image + image_tail 参数、dynamic_masks/static_mask 参数、camera_control 参数三选一，不能同时使用"},{en:"- Support varies by model version and video mode. See [Capability Map](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap) for details.",zh:"- 不同模型版本、视频模式支持范围不同，详见[能力地图](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap)"}]},{name:"prompt",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Positive text prompt",zh:"正向文本提示词"},notes:[{en:"- Cannot exceed 2500 characters",zh:"- 不能超过 2500 个字符"},{en:"- Use `<<<voice_1>>>` to specify voice, with the sequence matching the voice_list parameter order",zh:"- 用 `<<<voice_1>>>` 来指定音色，序号同 voice_list 参数所引用音色的排列顺序"},{en:'- A video generation task can reference up to 2 voices; when specifying a voice, the sound parameter must be "on"',zh:"- 一次视频生成任务至多引用 2 个音色；指定音色时，sound 参数值必须为 on"},{en:'- The simpler the syntax structure, the better. Example: `The man<<<voice_1>>> said: "Hello"`',zh:'- 语法结构越简单越好，如：男人<<<voice_1>>>说："你好"'},{en:'- When voice_list is not empty and prompt references voice ID, the task will be billed as "with specified voice"',zh:'- 当 voice_list 参数不为空且 prompt 参数中引用音色 ID 时，视频生成任务按"有指定音色"计量计费'},{en:"- Support varies by model version and video mode. See [Capability Map](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap) for details.",zh:"- 不同模型版本、视频模式支持范围不同，详见[能力地图](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap)"}]},{name:"negative_prompt",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Negative text prompt",zh:"负向文本提示词"},notes:[{en:"- Cannot exceed 2500 characters",zh:"- 不能超过 2500 个字符"}]},{name:"voice_list",type:"array",required:!1,description:{en:"List of voices referenced when generating videos",zh:"生成视频时所引用的音色的列表"},notes:[{en:"- A video generation task can reference up to 2 voices",zh:"- 一次视频生成任务至多引用 2 个音色"},{en:'- When voice_list is not empty and prompt references voice ID, the task will be billed as "with specified voice"',zh:'- 当 voice_list 参数不为空且 prompt 参数中引用音色 ID 时，视频生成任务按"有指定音色"计量计费'},{en:"- voice_id is returned through the voice customization API, or use system preset voices. See [Custom Voices API](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/customVoices); NOT the voice_id of Lip-Sync API",zh:"- voice_id 参数值通过音色定制接口返回，也可使用系统预置音色，[详见音色定制相关API](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/customVoices)；非对口型 API 的 voice_id"},{en:'Example:\n```json\n"voice_list":[\n  {"voice_id":"voice_id_1"},\n  {"voice_id":"voice_id_2"}\n]\n```',zh:'示例：\n```json\n"voice_list":[\n  {"voice_id":"voice_id_1"},\n  {"voice_id":"voice_id_2"}\n]\n```'},{en:"- Only V2.6 and later models support this parameter",zh:"- 仅 V2.6 及后续版本模型支持当前参数"}]},{name:"sound",type:"string",required:!1,default:"off",description:{en:"Whether to generate sound when generating video",zh:"生成视频时是否同时生成声音"},enum:["on","off"],notes:[{en:"- Only V2.6 and later models support this parameter",zh:"- 仅 V2.6 及后续版本模型支持当前参数"}]},{name:"cfg_scale",type:"float",required:!1,default:"0.5",description:{en:"Flexibility in video generation; higher value means lower model flexibility and stronger relevance to user prompt",zh:"生成视频的自由度；值越大，模型自由度越小，与用户输入的提示词相关性越强"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [0, 1]",zh:"- 取值范围：[0, 1]"},{en:"- kling-v2.x models do not support this parameter",zh:"- kling-v2.x 模型不支持当前参数"}]},{name:"mode",type:"string",required:!1,default:"std",description:{en:"Video generation mode",zh:"生成视频的模式"},enum:["std","pro"],notes:[{en:"- std: Standard Mode - basic mode, cost-effective",zh:"- std：标准模式（标准），基础模式，性价比高"},{en:"- pro: Professional Mode (High Quality) - high performance mode, better video quality",zh:"- pro：专家模式（高品质），高表现模式，生成视频质量更佳"},{en:"- Support varies by model version and video mode. See [Capability Map](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap) for details.",zh:"- 不同模型版本、视频模式支持范围不同，详见[能力地图](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap)"}]},{name:"static_mask",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Static brush mask area (mask image created by user using motion brush)",zh:"静态笔刷涂抹区域（用户通过运动笔刷涂抹的 mask 图片）"},notes:[{en:'- The "Motion Brush" feature includes Dynamic Brush (dynamic_masks) and Static Brush (static_mask)',zh:'- "运动笔刷"能力包含"动态笔刷 dynamic_masks"和"静态笔刷 static_mask"两种'},{en:"- Supports image Base64 encoding or image URL (same format requirements as image field)",zh:"- 支持传入图片 Base64 编码或图片 URL（确保可访问，格式要求同 image 字段）"},{en:"- Supported image formats: `.jpg / .jpeg / .png`",zh:"- 图片格式支持 `.jpg / .jpeg / .png`"},{en:"- Aspect ratio must match the input image (image field), otherwise task will fail",zh:"- 图片长宽比必须与输入图片相同（即 image 字段），否则任务失败（failed）"},{en:"- Resolution of static_mask and dynamic_masks.mask must be identical, otherwise task will fail",zh:"- static_mask 和 dynamic_masks.mask 这两张图片的分辨率必须一致，否则任务失败（failed）"},{en:"- Support varies by model version and video mode. See [Capability Map](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap) for details.",zh:"- 不同模型版本、视频模式支持范围不同，详见[能力地图](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap)"}]},{name:"dynamic_masks",type:"array",required:!1,description:{en:"Dynamic brush configuration list",zh:"动态笔刷配置列表"},notes:[{en:'- Can configure multiple groups (up to 6), each containing "mask area" and "motion trajectory" sequence',zh:'- 可配置多组（最多 6 组），每组包含"涂抹区域 mask"与"运动轨迹 trajectories"序列'},{en:"- Support varies by model version and video mode. See [Capability Map](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap) for details.",zh:"- 不同模型版本、视频模式支持范围不同，详见[能力地图](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap)"}],children:[{name:"mask",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Dynamic brush mask area (mask image created by user using motion brush)",zh:"动态笔刷涂抹区域（用户通过运动笔刷涂抹的 mask 图片）"},notes:[{en:"- Supports image Base64 encoding or image URL (same format requirements as image field)",zh:"- 支持传入图片 Base64 编码或图片 URL（确保可访问，格式要求同 image 字段）"},{en:"- Supported image formats: .jpg / .jpeg / .png",zh:"- 图片格式支持 .jpg / .jpeg / .png"},{en:"- Aspect ratio must match the input image (image field), otherwise task will fail",zh:"- 图片长宽比必须与输入图片相同（即 image 字段），否则任务失败（failed）"},{en:"- Resolution of static_mask and dynamic_masks.mask must be identical, otherwise task will fail",zh:"- static_mask 和 dynamic_masks.mask 这两张图片的分辨率必须一致，否则任务失败（failed）"}]},{name:"trajectories",type:"array",required:!0,description:{en:"Motion trajectory coordinate sequence",zh:"运动轨迹坐标序列"},notes:[{en:"- For 5s video, trajectory length ≤77, coordinate count range: [2, 77]",zh:"- 生成 5s 的视频，轨迹长度不超过 77，即坐标个数取值范围：[2, 77]"},{en:"- Coordinate system uses bottom-left corner of image as origin",zh:"- 轨迹坐标系，以图片左下角为坐标原点"},{en:"- Note 1: More coordinate points = more accurate trajectory. 2 points = straight line between them",zh:"- 注1：坐标点个数越多轨迹刻画越准确，如只有 2 个轨迹点则为这两点连接的直线"},{en:"- Note 2: Trajectory direction follows input order. First coordinate is start point, subsequent coordinates are connected sequentially",zh:"- 注2：轨迹方向以传入顺序为指向，以最先传入的坐标为轨迹起点，依次链接后续坐标形成运动轨迹"}],children:[{name:"x",type:"int",required:!0,description:{en:"X coordinate of trajectory point (pixel coordinate with image bottom-left as origin)",zh:"轨迹点横坐标（在像素二维坐标系下，以输入图片 image 左下为原点的像素坐标）"}},{name:"y",type:"int",required:!0,description:{en:"Y coordinate of trajectory point (pixel coordinate with image bottom-left as origin)",zh:"轨迹点纵坐标（在像素二维坐标系下，以输入图片 image 左下为原点的像素坐标）"}}]}]},{name:"camera_control",type:"object",required:!1,description:{en:"Camera movement control protocol (if not specified, model will intelligently match based on input text/images)",zh:"控制摄像机运动的协议（如未指定，模型将根据输入的文本/图片进行智能匹配）"},notes:[{en:"- Support varies by model version and video mode. See [Capability Map](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap) for details.",zh:"- 不同模型版本、视频模式支持范围不同，详见[能力地图](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap)"}],children:[{name:"type",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Predefined camera movement type",zh:"预定义的运镜类型"},enum:["simple","down_back","forward_up","right_turn_forward","left_turn_forward"],notes:[{en:'- simple: Simple camera movement, can choose one of six options in "config"',zh:'- simple：简单运镜，此类型下可在"config"中六选一进行运镜'},{en:"- down_back: Camera descends and moves backward ➡️ Pan down and zoom out. config parameter not required",zh:"- down_back：镜头下压并后退 ➡️ 下移拉远，此类型下 config 参数无需填写"},{en:"- forward_up: Camera moves forward and tilts up ➡️ Zoom in and pan up. config parameter not required",zh:"- forward_up：镜头前进并上仰 ➡️ 推进上移，此类型下 config 参数无需填写"},{en:"- right_turn_forward: Rotate right then move forward ➡️ Right rotation advance. config parameter not required",zh:"- right_turn_forward：先右旋转后前进 ➡️ 右旋推进，此类型下 config 参数无需填写"},{en:"- left_turn_forward: Rotate left then move forward ➡️ Left rotation advance. config parameter not required",zh:"- left_turn_forward：先左旋并前进 ➡️ 左旋推进，此类型下 config 参数无需填写"}]},{name:"config",type:"object",required:!1,description:{en:"Contains 6 fields to specify camera movement in different directions",zh:"包含六个字段，用于指定摄像机在不同方向上的运动或变化"},notes:[{en:'- Required when type is "simple"; leave empty for other types',zh:"- 当运镜类型指定 simple 时必填，指定其他类型时不填"},{en:"- Choose only one parameter to be non-zero; rest must be 0",zh:"- 以下参数 6 选 1，即只能有一个参数不为 0，其余参数为 0"}],children:[{name:"horizontal",type:"float",required:!1,description:{en:"Horizontal movement - camera translation along x-axis",zh:"水平运镜，控制摄像机在水平方向上的移动量（沿 x 轴平移）"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [-10, 10]. Negative = left, Positive = right",zh:"- 取值范围：[-10, 10]，负值表示向左平移，正值表示向右平移"}]},{name:"vertical",type:"float",required:!1,description:{en:"Vertical movement - camera translation along y-axis",zh:"垂直运镜，控制摄像机在垂直方向上的移动量（沿 y 轴平移）"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [-10, 10]. Negative = down, Positive = up",zh:"- 取值范围：[-10, 10]，负值表示向下平移，正值表示向上平移"}]},{name:"pan",type:"float",required:!1,description:{en:"Horizontal pan - camera rotation around y-axis",zh:"水平摇镜，控制摄像机在水平面上的旋转量（绕 y 轴旋转）"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [-10, 10]. Negative = rotate left, Positive = rotate right",zh:"- 取值范围：[-10, 10]，负值表示绕 y 轴向左旋转，正值表示绕 y 轴向右旋转"}]},{name:"tilt",type:"float",required:!1,description:{en:"Vertical tilt - camera rotation around x-axis",zh:"垂直摇镜，控制摄像机在垂直面上的旋转量（沿 x 轴旋转）"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [-10, 10]. Negative = tilt down, Positive = tilt up",zh:"- 取值范围：[-10, 10]，负值表示绕 x 轴向下旋转，正值表示绕 x 轴向上旋转"}]},{name:"roll",type:"float",required:!1,description:{en:"Roll - camera rotation around z-axis",zh:"旋转运镜，控制摄像机的滚动量（绕 z 轴旋转）"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [-10, 10]. Negative = counterclockwise, Positive = clockwise",zh:"- 取值范围：[-10, 10]，负值表示绕 z 轴逆时针旋转，正值表示绕 z 轴顺时针旋转"}]},{name:"zoom",type:"float",required:!1,description:{en:"Zoom - controls camera focal length change, affects field of view",zh:"变焦，控制摄像机的焦距变化，影响视野的远近"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [-10, 10]. Negative = longer focal length (narrower FOV), Positive = shorter focal length (wider FOV)",zh:"- 取值范围：[-10, 10]，负值表示焦距变长、视野范围变小，正值表示焦距变短、视野范围变大"}]}]}]},{name:"duration",type:"string",required:!1,default:"5",description:{en:"Video duration in seconds",zh:"生成视频时长，单位 s"},enum:["5","10"]},{name:"watermark_info",type:"object",required:!1,description:{en:"Whether to generate watermarked results simultaneously",zh:"是否同时生成含水印的结果"},notes:[{en:'- Defined by the enabled parameter, format: \n```json\n  "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } \n```',zh:'- 通过enabled参数定义，具体格式如下：\n```json\n "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } \n```'},{en:"- true: generate watermarked result, false: do not generate",zh:"- true 为生成，false 为不生成"},{en:"- Custom watermarks are not currently supported",zh:"- 暂不支持自定义水印"}]},{name:"callback_url",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Callback notification URL for task result. If configured, server will notify when task status changes.",zh:"本次任务结果回调通知地址，如果配置，服务端会在任务状态发生变更时主动通知"},notes:[{en:"- For specific message schema, see [Callback Protocol](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/callbackProtocol)",zh:"- 具体通知的消息 schema 见 [Callback 协议](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/callbackProtocol)"}]},{name:"external_task_id",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Customized Task ID",zh:"自定义任务 ID"},notes:[{en:"- Will not overwrite system-generated task ID, but supports querying task by this ID",zh:"- 用户自定义任务 ID，传入不会覆盖系统生成的任务 ID，但支持通过该 ID 进行任务查询"},{en:"- Must be unique within a single user account",zh:"- 请注意，单用户下需要保证唯一性"}]}],responseExample:{zh:'{\n  "code": 0, // 错误码；具体定义见错误码\n  "message": "string", // 错误信息\n  "request_id": "string", // 请求ID，系统生成，用于跟踪请求、排查问题\n  "data": {\n    "task_id": "string", // 任务ID，系统生成\n    "task_info": { // 任务创建时的参数信息\n      "external_task_id": "string" // 客户自定义任务ID\n    },\n    "task_status": "string", // 任务状态，枚举值：submitted（已提交）、processing（处理中）、succeed（成功）、failed（失败）\n    "created_at": 1722769557708, // 任务创建时间，Unix时间戳、单位ms\n    "updated_at": 1722769557708 // 任务更新时间，Unix时间戳、单位ms\n  }\n}',en:'{\n  "code": 0, // Error codes; Specific definitions can be found in "Error Code"\n  "message": "string", // Error information\n  "request_id": "string", // Request ID, generated by the system\n  "data": {\n    "task_id": "string", // Task ID, generated by the system\n    "task_info": { // Task creation parameters\n      "external_task_id": "string" // Customer-defined task ID\n    },\n    "task_status": "string", // Task status, Enum values: submitted, processing, succeed, failed\n    "created_at": 1722769557708, // Task creation time, Unix timestamp, unit ms\n    "updated_at": 1722769557708 // Task update time, Unix timestamp, unit ms\n  }\n}'},codeExamples:[{language:"cURL",code:{zh:'curl --location --request POST \'https://api-beijing.klingai.com/v1/videos/image2video\' \\\n--header \'Authorization: Bearer <token>\' \\\n--header
```
